measurement.audio_source: synthetic (deterministic 440 Hz tone + light noise, per whisper_cuda_large_v3_rtf.rs::make_sample_pcm)

statistics.note: 5 consecutive measured passes (each preceded by an in-process warm-up transcribe that pays session build + weight upload + NVRTC JIT); wall clock is the second, timed pass.

sanity_gate.formal_gate_deferred_to: M2-14 self-hosted CUDA runner + M3-01 5% regression gate (see whisper_cuda_large_v3_rtf.rs docstring)

flash_attention_v2.note: The FA v2 launcher stub returns BackendUnavailable per T-follow-02/03. The VOKRA_CUDA_DISABLE_FA_V2=1 override (context.rs commit d469429) forces the decomposed path so the sanity gate can measure a real number today. Once launch_flash_attn_v2 lands, this override becomes unnecessary and the measured RTF is expected to improve (target < 0.10 per M2-14 formal gate).

backend.silent_cpu_fallback: forbidden (FR-EX-08); both decomposed and FA v2 paths stay on the GPU

hardware.vokra_ffi_model: raw dlopen(libcuda.so.1) + dlopen(libnvrtc.so.12); no cudart/cudnn/cublas/cudarc bundled (NVIDIA EULA install model + zero-dep NFR-DS-02)

how_to_reproduce: vastai search offers 'gpu_name=RTX_4090 num_gpus=1 verified=true rentable=true'
ssh in, install rust 1.86, git clone https://github.com/ayutaz/vokra.git

sanity_summary: On an RTX 4090, whisper-large-v3 (F16, 3.09 GB GGUF) transcribes 30 s of audio in 3.394-3.404 s wall (median 3.400 s), RTF ≈ 0.1133 through the decomposed self-attention path. This is a reference number, not the formal < 0.10 always-on gate — that number requires the FA v2 launcher to be implemented (deferred to M2-03-followup-rtf-sub-0.1 T-follow-02/03) and lives as an always-on regression gate at M2-14 / M3-01.
